title: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) CFO to Depart, Successor Hunt Starts
text: Mike Zechmeister will not be associated with C.H. Robinson (CHRW) beyond May 31, 2024.

title: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) CEO Expects Freight Scene to Mend in 2H24
text: C.H Robinson (CHRW) is looking to cut costs and boost efficiency to combat the decline in freight demand.

title: C.H. Robinson Announces Chief Financial Officer Transition

title: These unsung stock market heroes offer 9 favorite picks for 2024
text: Stock newsletter writers don't pop up much on CNBC, but that doesn't mean you should ignore these unsung market heroes. Many are great analysts with solid long-term records.

title: 3 Transport-Service Stocks to Watch Amid Industry Hiccups
text: The Zacks Industry Rank for the Transportation-Services industry paints a dull picture mainly owing to the slowdown in freight demand. We believe stocks like EXPD, CHRW and MATX are better positioned to escape industry challenges.

title: 10 Buffett-Style Dividend Aristocrats Yielding As Much As 10%
text: Stocks are having their best November in 43 years, and stocks are now 13% historically overvalued. But thankfully, smart investors can always find incredible Warren Buffett-style bargains, both of the deep value and "wonderful company at a fair price" variety. These 10 high-yield aristocrats average a 5.3% dividend, A-credit rating, and offer 12.6% long-term return potential, the same as the Nasdaq, but with 6X the much safer and more dependable yield.

title: Why Is C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Up 0.8% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: C.H. Robinson (CHRW) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
